title: Zepto’s IPO filing reveals fast growth, bigger losses, and a valuation question nobody’s answered yet
summary: Zepto's IPO filing shows strong growth momentum with advertising revenue surging 151%, though it grows faster than overall operating revenue of 104%, raising questions about sustainable profitability. The filing highlights the tension between rapid expansion and financial viability in India's competitive quick-commerce market.
content: Zepto's advertising revenue jumped 151%, outpacing the company's 104% growth in operating revenue.

zh.title: Zepto IPO申报文件显示快速增长、更大亏损，以及一个尚无人解答的估值问题
zh.summary: Zepto的IPO申报文件显示强劲的增长势头，广告收入激增151%，尽管其增速快于整体运营收入104%的增速，这引发了对可持续盈利能力的疑问。该申报文件突出了印度竞争激烈的快速商务市场中快速扩张与财务可行性之间的矛盾。

title: Why Apple’s slow-and-steady AI bet is starting to look pretty smart
summary: Apple's measured approach to AI development, initially criticized as slow, may prove strategic as the company introduces new AI capabilities through Apple Intelligence. The move positions Apple to compete in the AI race without the execution risks that plague competitors moving too quickly.
content: Can Apple's new AI glow up put to bed accusations that it's losing an all-important industry race?

zh.title: 为什么Apple缓慢而稳健的AI押注开始看起来相当明智
zh.summary: Apple对AI开发采取的谨慎态度最初因速度缓慢而遭到批评，但随着该公司通过Apple Intelligence推出新的AI功能，这种方法可能被证明是战略性的。这一举措使Apple能够在AI竞争中保持竞争力，而不必承担那些仓促行动的竞争对手所面临的执行风险。

title: FCC lifts looming deadline for Amazon Leo satellite broadband constellation
summary: The FCC granted Amazon a waiver to develop its Project Kuiper satellite broadband constellation, removing a previous deadline constraint. The decision supports competition in satellite internet by enabling a second major constellation alongside existing players.
content: The waiver "serves the public interest by promoting a second large satellite broadband constellation."

zh.title: FCC取消了Amazon Leo卫星宽带星座的迫在眉睫的期限
zh.summary: FCC批准了Amazon开发Project Kuiper卫星宽带星座的豁免，取消了之前的期限约束。该决定通过实现第二个主要星座与现有参与者并行发展，支持了卫星互联网的竞争。

title: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia over ‘dual-pricing’ valuation tricks
summary: Mercor's CEO calls out Sequoia Capital for selling equity at two different prices, a practice shared by other top-tier venture firms. The criticism raises concerns about fairness and transparency in VC valuations.
content: Sequoia is just one of the top firms that sells same equity at two different prices.

zh.title: Mercor首席执行官布兰登·富迪指责红杉资本的"双重定价"估值伎俩
zh.summary: Mercor首席执行官指责红杉资本以两种不同价格出售股权，这一做法也被其他一流风险投资公司采用。这一批评引发了对风险投资估值公平性和透明度的关注。
